## Guest information

Check-in time is 4:00 p.m.  
Check-out time is 12:00 p.m. (noon)

Late check-out or early check-in is by request only and subject to availability. Additional fees may apply. 24-hour cancellation notice is required.

There are eight (8) ADA accessible rooms at the hotel.

These rooms are in full compliance with the Americans with Disabilities Act.

The Housekeeping Department can also provide raised toilet seats and shower chairs upon request.

Pets of all sizes are welcome at the hotel for a fee of $60 per night.

The pet must be on a leash at all times and must not be left unattended in the room. Any damage incurred to the room by the pet is the responsibility of the guest.

Guide dogs are always welcome and exempt of charges.

A safe is located in each guest room and suite for your convenience.

## Guest services

Bellmen are located at the main Market Street entrance to the hot...[truncated 3727 chars]...joy spacious rooms and suites with breathtaking city views, plush furnishings, and exceptional service for an unforgettable stay.

  
  

  

  EXPLORE ROOMS

TOLL FREE ROOM RESERVATION

Telephone [+1 888 270 6647](tel:+18882706647)

Vue Map

## Getting Here

Head North on Airport Blvd towards PittsburghKeep left at the forkMerge onto I-376 ETake exit 70A onto Liberty AveTurn right onto Market StreetFairmont Pittsburgh (510 Market Street) is on your left

We are proud to partner with Regency Transportation, offering reliable city-wide transportation for our guests.

Convenient to pick up and drop off directly at the hotel's entrance.

- Guaranteed best rates when you book on our website
